title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Tata Motors

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Tata Motors
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Tata Motors in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tata Motors:
Tata Motors is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Motors!
